language_claim: Cantonese conventionally permits 用嚟/用來 to relate an overt object, resource, or artifact to a stated use or function; intention, affordance, actual-use-event, subject/topic status, omitted-topic licensing, and broader alternative-marker boundaries remain provisional.
parser_representation_decision: Canto Span represents the narrow supported relation with one IntendedFunctionRelation node. Direct resource NPs are not forced into a public Topic analysis; a Topic child is retained only when a separate overt user supports left dislocation. 用, 嚟/來, predicate material, controls, and particles remain transparent.
parser_heuristic: The parser selects IntendedFunctionRelation only when an overt non-person function-bearing resource precedes adjacent 用 + 嚟/來 and visible predicate material. Modal readings and perfective action material remain review-bearing. Lone-user, bare-linker, aspect-interrupted, A-not-A, reduplicated 用來用去, coordination, lexical-use, instrumental-use, and directional-motion environments remain outside this narrow replacement or blocked.
audit_trigger: source reverification, manual corpus review, second independent speaker, code-document mismatch, boundary failure, or conflicting evidence
audit_note: Provisional claim requires retroactive source re-verification and two-speaker review. Legacy source counts and internal test results retain historical value but carry no productive-acceptance weight until rechecked. CP019-r2 revises the rendered candidate by removing automatic public Topic analysis from direct resource NPs, marking modal affordance ambiguity, supplying pronunciation-only unknown-CJK coverage, and adding specific learner hovers. No productive promotion or native analysis validation is claimed. Prior provisional status withdrawn until the current provisional Definition-of-Done checklist is reverified.

parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses PostThemeParticipantRelation as a theory-neutral predicate-level node that preserves the upstream VP, marker, person, and optional final predicate without selecting a marker category or semantic participant role.
parser_heuristic: Only the five CP021B-frozen predicate profiles may emit the node; the participant gets structural slots only and every output remains review-bearing and nonproductive.

language_claim: Hong Kong Cantonese independently attests a simple overt action predicate + postverbal 咗 + overt nominal object profile as perfective viewpoint aspect. 咗 is not itself a past-tense suffix, and this subtype does not by itself assert endpoint completion, result state, experiential meaning, hidden arguments, or unrestricted verb-object compatibility.
parser_representation_decision: Canto Span represents only the source-linked simple V + 咗 + overt-object profile as PostverbalZoPerfectiveVP while preserving PerfectiveVP as the public compatibility label. Objectless, inner-result, motion-goal, placement, and other perfective profiles remain under separate or broad provisional analyses.
parser_heuristic: Select this subtype only when the existing slot-template engine observes an overt action predicate, overt 咗, and overt nominal object in that order. Selectional incompatibility remains review-bearing and the subtype cannot insert a subject or object.
audit_trigger: source reverification, manual corpus review, second independent speaker, code-document mismatch, boundary failure, or conflicting evidence
audit_note: Prior productive status withdrawn under the 2026-07 retroactive evidence standard. Legacy source counts and internal test results retain historical value but carry no productive-acceptance weight until rechecked. Accepted in v0.5.180 after 12/12 render adjudication and 7/7 prospective held-out success. Promotion applies only to simple overt V + 咗 + overt nominal object. Broad PerfectiveVP and native-conflicted V完咗O remain unpromoted.

language_claim: Modern Cantonese attests a direct overt non-person resource or artifact + adjacent 用嚟/用來 + overt action-predicate profile that states the resource’s use or function. This subtype does not itself assert an actual-use event, modal affordance, separate user, hidden resource, ordinary instrumental 用, or general purposive 嚟.
parser_representation_decision: Canto Span represents only the source-linked direct resource profile as internal ResourceUseLaiFunctionRelation while preserving IntendedFunctionRelation as the public compatibility label. The overt resource remains neutral between subject and topic, and 用, 嚟/來, and predicate material remain transparent.
parser_heuristic: Select the subtype only when an overt non-person resource precedes adjacent 用 + 嚟/來 and an overt action predicate, with no separate user, modal, copula, negator, or perfective actual-use material. The subtype inserts no hidden arguments and cannot license ordinary instrumental 用 or general purposive 嚟.
audit_trigger: source reverification, manual corpus review, second independent speaker, code-document mismatch, boundary failure, or conflicting evidence
audit_note: Prior productive status withdrawn under the 2026-07 retroactive evidence standard. Legacy source counts and internal test results retain historical value but carry no productive-acceptance weight until rechecked. Accepted narrowly in v0.5.182 after the previously frozen parser passed 15/15 rendered rows with 133/133 assertions and 8/8 fresh prospective held-out expectations. Productive evidence consists of three independent natural attestations: Wong 2023 呢個用嚟切嘢; Hong Kong Memory 另一邊用來儲物 in interview-derived narrative; and a direct Countryside Conservation Office quotation 呢間屋用嚟擺嘢、養豬養牛. Cheung 2018 independently supports purposive 嚟 and conventionalized 用來/用嚟. Chor 2018 and Matthews 2006 remain boundary/competing-analysis evidence only. Generated probes, render examples, parser fixtures, corpus candidate hits, and held-out cases are not counted as natural attestations. Broad IntendedFunctionRelation remains provisional, and native structural-analysis validation remains zero.
